goal: Phase 2 source/catalog snapshot model for Orun (component catalog)
next_focus: orun-component-catalog Milestone C1 — internal/sourcectx resolver: Git/Clock/Filesystem adapters, WorkspaceState.Resolve populating headRevision/treeHash/dirtyHash/catalogInputHash, T-IDK-4 property
notes: Phase 2 Milestone C0 (code half) shipped via PR #168 (squash commit 7f3f2bf) on 2026-05-31. internal/catalogmodel and internal/sourcectx skeleton on main; canonical encoder, JSON Schema generator (committed artifact + verify-generated drift gate), golden roundtrip fixtures, T-IDK-1/T-IDK-3/T-IDK-5 property tests. Coverage floors on main: catalogmodel 90.2%, sourcectx 91.3%, Sanitize* 100%, plus Phase 1 floors held byte-for-byte (statestore 95.7%, revision 90.3%, executionstate 90.0%).

Verifier-attached fix on PR #168: implementer shipped at 81.7% catalogmodel coverage (under the spec-mandated 90% floor) because the Makefile only gated Sanitize* at 100% — the package-level gate was never wired. Verifier added internal/catalogmodel/coverage_test.go (CanonicalEncodeString/CanonicalEqual/CatalogInputHash + edge paths) and hardened the Makefile with package-level >=90% gates on both catalogmodel and sourcectx so this can't silently regress.

Phase 2 (orun-component-catalog) authoritative spec lives at specs/orun-component-catalog/ with 11 docs: README.md, design.md, data-model.md, identity-and-keys.md, resolution-pipeline.md, catalog-store.md, compatibility-and-migration.md, cli-surface.md, sync-model.md, implementation-plan.md, test-plan.md, risks-and-open-questions.md.

Milestones C0–C9. C0 ✅ COMPLETE. C1 next: internal/sourcectx resolver (Git HEAD probe, treeHash, dirtyHash, catalogInputHash). C2 = catalogresolve; C3 = catalogstore; C4 wires plan/run; C5 unlocks TUI consumption; C6 compatibility shims; C7 catalog CLI surface + indexes; C8 catalogdiff; C9 catalogsync seam (Syncer interface + NoopSyncer only — no HTTP, no auth).
Phase 2 is local-only. No HTTP, no SaaS, no DB schema. internal/catalogsync ships only the Syncer interface and a NoopSyncer.
Phase 1 invariants preserved: do not rename Phase 1 fields, do not lower coverage floors, do not remove preserved CLI workflows.

Carry-forward (deferred from Phase 1, candidates for follow-on within Phase 2 scope): MirrorModeHardlink debug-fold decision, RunnerHooks.AfterStateUpdate async-mirror evaluation, --persist-revision flag wiring, Option B trigger-name resolver branch (ai/proposals/task-0019-spec-update.md), --prune-legacy.
